detail.description:
This game includes optional in-game purchases, including random virtual items.
Don't go into Hollows.
I know, I know, there are Ether resources in the Hollows, bizarre creations, even ruins of the old civilization — all invaluable treasures.
But don't forget about the spatial disorder, the monsters, and mutants running rampant. Ultimately, this is a disaster that could swallow the world. Hollows are not where ordinary people should go.
So don't go into Hollows.
Or at least, don't go in alone.
If
detail.recentChanges:
New Version 2.8 "New: Eridan Sunset" is now live!
[New Characters]
• S-Rank Agent Promeia (Ice - Anomaly)
• S-Rank Agent Starlight - Billy (Physical - Rupture)

[Returning Characters]
• S-Rank Agent Lucia (Ether - Support)
• S-Rank Agent Orphie & Magus (Fire - Attack)

[New Outfit]
• Hoshimi Miyabi: Dignified Blossom

For other update details, please check the in-game announcements.
